summary: Complete testing of Gate Status/Indicator Separation Feature. Backend: 8/8 tests passed - indicator field properly stored in gates, status limited to open/closed, indicator limited to light/medium/crowded. Frontend: GatesTab shows TWO separate filter rows (Status: الكل/مفتوح/مغلق and Indicator: الكل/خفيف/متوسط/مزدحم), 17 gate cards with dual control rows for status and indicator, indicator bar only appears for open gates (disabled for closed gates like باب إسماعيل).

backend_api.session_has_indicator_field: PASS - Gate session gates have indicator field (light/medium/crowded)
backend_api.update_indicator_for_open_gate: PASS - Indicator updates correctly without changing status
backend_api.status_to_closed_resets_indicator: PASS - Closing gate resets indicator to 'light'
backend_api.status_only_accepts_open_closed: PASS - All gates have status = open or closed (no crowded)
backend_api.session_stats_separation: PASS - Stats show open/closed counts + indicator counts separately
backend_api.update_only_indicator: PASS - Updating indicator preserves other fields
backend_api.update_status_without_indicator: PASS - Updating status preserves indicator default

frontend_gates_tab.two_filter_rows: PASS - Status row and Indicator row displayed separately
frontend_gates_tab.status_filter_options: PASS - Status filters: الكل (17), مفتوح (16), مغلق (1) - NO مزدحم
frontend_gates_tab.indicator_filter_options: PASS - Indicator filters: الكل (16), خفيف (15), متوسط (0), مزدحم (1)
frontend_gates_tab.gate_status_bar: PASS - Each gate card has status control bar (مفتوح/مغلق)
frontend_gates_tab.gate_indicator_bar: PASS - Open gate cards have indicator bar (خفيف/متوسط/مزدحم)
frontend_gates_tab.closed_gate_no_indicator: PASS - Closed gates (باب إسماعيل) do NOT show indicator bar
frontend_gates_tab.indicator_disabled_for_closed_filter: PASS - Indicator filters disabled when status=closed filter selected
frontend_gates_tab.session_header_stats: PASS - Header shows separated counts: 17 باب, 16 مفتوح, 1 مغلق, 1 مزدحم

critical_code_review_comments: STATUS_CONFIG and INDICATOR_CONFIG properly separated in GatesTab.jsx
Status filter row correctly shows only الكل/مفتوح/مغلق (no مزدحم)
Indicator filter row correctly shows الكل/خفيف/متوسط/مزدحم with Gauge icon
Gate cards have TWO control rows: status bar (line 184-196) and indicator bar (line 205-219)
Indicator bar only renders for open gates (isOpen && isDraft condition on line 205)
Backend SessionGate model has indicator field (line 625 in models.py)
Backend SessionGateUpdate model accepts indicator updates (line 658 in models.py)
data-testid attributes properly added for all filter buttons and gate controls
seed_data_creation: Session for Feb 27 (ID: 9b93b01f-4acd-4374-8f8f-260bb6c53c16) has 17 gates with mixed status and indicators
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 tested Gate Status/Indicator Separation. Key data-testids: gates-tab, filter-status-all/open/closed, filter-indicator-all/light/medium/crowded, gate-card-{id}, gate-status-bar-{id}, gate-indicator-bar-{id}, gate-{id}-status-open/closed, gate-{id}-indicator-light/medium/crowded. Session for Feb 27 has 17 gates: 16 open (15 light, 1 crowded), 1 closed. Backend endpoints: PUT /api/admin/gate-sessions/{id}/gates/{gate_id} accepts indicator field. Status only accepts 'open'/'closed'. Indicator only appears for open gates.
